violations.text: Soap was not available at the hand-washing sinks at the bars. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Soup was provided for the handwashing sink at the downstairs bar; upstairs bar was not in service. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026
The handwashing sink at the downstairs bar is lacking proper signage. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2026
Molluscan Shellfish tags did not have all of the required information. Dates last item served were lacking. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2026

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the dish machines. Inspector provided during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: -ice machine vent -wall-mounted utensil rack. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2026
